Market Context: Intraday move caused stop-out on first trade despite solid setup. Market cooled in afternoon for second trade.
Lessons Learned: Stopped out on intraday move. Trade was solid and would have closed OTM. First substantial loss on Account #3. The stop did its job — contained the loss. Position would have expired profitable if held, but holding through the stop is exactly the behaviour the framework is designed to prevent.
Tags: Bull Put Spread, SPX, 0DTE, Loss, Stop-triggered
